title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 07 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 07 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 07 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 07/03/2024
DCE iron ore futures open lower and go higher, futures in the day by1.83%. the main contract I2405 closed 890.Some traders were active to sell,；Some steel procurement more cautious, the continuation of a small number of multifrequency procurement strategy. PBF at Shandong port dealt 893-898 yuan/mt; increased 0-3 yuan/mt over yesterday.
